channel.title: Specialized on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Specialized on Mizubikes

item.title: Why I Chose the Stumpjumper 15 Alloy for My Trail Build
item.description: Part one of my Stumpjumper 15 Alloy build series: why an alloy frameset on sale beat a carbon build, and what the GENIE platform actually gets you.

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9 Is Official: Here's What Actually Changed
item.description: Specialized has officially launched the S-Works Tarmac SL9, calling it the fastest road bike it's ever made. Here's what's real, what's marketing, and how it stacks up against the SL8.

item.title: Specialized Tarmac SL9: What the Leaks Actually Show
item.description: Leaked images and video of the Specialized Tarmac SL9 have been spreading since May. Here's what the spy shots actually tell us — and what they don't.

item.title: Crux 5 vs Road Bike: Is the Quiver Killer Finally Here?
item.description: The Crux 5 weighs 789g, clears 55mm tires, and borrows aero shaping from the Tarmac SL8. Here's the honest case for replacing your road bike with one.

item.title: Specialized Crux 5: The Gravel Race Bike Goes Full Aero
item.description: Specialized officially launches the Crux 5 with aero tube shaping, 55mm tire clearance, and a FACT 12r frame under 790 grams.

item.title: The Crux 5 Is the Gravel Bike We Knew Was Coming
item.description: The Specialized Crux 5 goes full aero and leaves its cyclocross roots behind. Here's why that was inevitable — and what it might cost us down the road.

item.title: Epic 8 vs Epic 9: What Actually Changed and Should You Upgrade?
item.description: Specialized just released the Epic 9. If you're already on an Epic 8, here's a breakdown of every meaningful change and what it means for your decision to upgrade.

item.title: The Specialized Epic 9 Is Here. My Epic 8 Evo Isn't Going Anywhere.
item.description: The Epic 9 just dropped. As someone already on an Epic 8 Evo, here's where I honestly landed.

item.title: New Specialized Crux: Everything We Know Before Unbound
item.description: A new Specialized Crux is coming — and it looks nothing like its cyclocross roots. Here's everything the rumor mill is saying ahead of an expected Unbound reveal.
